title: Starforge (disambiguation)
content:
'''Starforge''' can refer to more than one thing:
*the [[Star Forge]], an ancient [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] weapon of the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] used during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*[[StarForge Station]], a mobile [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] used by the fringe during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*[[StarForge Nebula/Legends|StarForge Nebula]]
{{Disambig}}
